title: tristemma capitatum
intro: Tristemma capitatum, also known as the Malayan buttonbush, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, providing relief from pain and inflammation. Tristemma capitatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
